task_id: 补齐反馈附件详情契约与元数据返回
summary: QA 验证通过。后端 feedback detail / admin detail 已在保留 attachment_ids 兼容的同时新增 attachments[]，包含 file_id/file_name/file_size/mime_type/download_url 五个字段；file_service.get_uploaded_file_summaries() 按 attachment_ids 顺序展开；测试 25 passed，覆盖用户侧与管理员侧两条 detail 路径。
test_commands: py-compile feedback.py admin_feedback.py file_service.py test_feedback_api.py → passed

acceptance_criteria.criterion: feedback detail / admin detail 返回 attachments[]

acceptance_criteria.evidence: file_service.py:245-252 返回 5 个字段（超出最小契约）
测试断言 payload['attachment_ids'] 仍存在

acceptance_criteria.criterion: 补测试覆盖详情接口输出
acceptance_criteria.evidence: test_feedback_api.py:251-299 覆盖用户侧+管理员侧

verified_implementation.file_service: get_uploaded_file_summaries() (file_service.py:271-273) 按 attachment_ids 顺序调用 get_uploaded_files() 后展开为 UploadedFileSummary 列表

verified_implementation.admin_side: admin_feedback.py detail helper 同步补出 attachments
verified_implementation.order_preserved: get_uploaded_files() (file_service.py:266-267) 按 attachment_ids 原始顺序排序

residual_risks: 当 attachment_id 在 uploaded_files 中不存在时会被跳过，attachments[] 可能少于 attachment_ids 长度；但 attachment_ids 原值保留便于排障
响应模型在 feedback.py/admin_feedback.py 本地定义而非统一 schema，长期维护建议收敛到 app/schemas/
